creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Maintainer gave feedback, flagging. miwi@, any updates with this? Also please note comment #7 about newer version having become available in the meantime, and comment #5.

Folks, please also note there's a new port submission in Bug #210371, Backwards compatibility layer for APC / PHP70, I don't know if that is helpful here.
